initiative.title: Initiative: JobSane calm job hunt operating system
initiative.north_star: Only surface the most important decisions Lars can make best: apply, skip, research, follow up, prepare, or improve profile strategy.
initiative.product_loop: Discover -> curate in Jobpipe -> decide -> apply workbench -> track -> follow up -> learn.
guardrails: Jobpipe is canonical for new jobs and lifecycle state.
No auto-apply or recruiter portal submit without approval.
No fake CV or cover letter claims.

toolchain_notes: Python 3.14 + anyio plugin autoload + Windows = OSError [WinError 10106] at asyncio backend init. Workaround: PYTEST_DISABLE_PLUGIN_AUTOLOAD=1 + explicit -p no:debugging -p no:cacheprovider. Separate follow-up slice should pin pytest plugins or add pyproject.toml pytest config.

implementation_pr.note: Last merged PR was #156 (2026-04-30). See merged_since_last_update for full list.

op2_lane.name: Op 2: OSS unification + upstream-fork integration model

upstream_fork_model.principle: Use upstream repos as intended by GitHub. Slim seams, replaceable adapters, minimum integration. JobPipe is the engine; the forked/external repos are noise-reducing surfaces up until the candidate presses apply.

reactive_resume.role: GUI/editor for structured resumes + structured JSON interchange surface
reactive_resume.integration: upstream-as-intended via JSON round-trip CLIs (jobpipe import-reactive-resume, jobpipe export-reactive-resume-plan, jobpipe record-reactive-resume-document)
reactive_resume.canonical_ownership: stays in JobPipe (evidence selection, claim targeting, narrative constraints)

jobsync.role: candidate-facing workflow/decision surface - what to apply to, application status tracking
jobsync.integration: upstream-as-intended via event-based CLIs (jobpipe export-jobsync, jobpipe record-jobsync-event)
jobsync.canonical_ownership: stays in JobPipe (job evaluation state, claims, selection logic, evidence and narrative semantics)

crewai.role: agent runtime for cooperative author/revise loop — cover letter, CV tailoring, screening questions, interview prep
crewai.integration: sub-crew architecture defined in specs/jobsane-crew-architecture-2026-05-03.md. Enters inside the author/revise agent layer only after JobPipe produces AuthoringCaseContext.
crewai.status: spec complete — waits on AuthoringCaseContext contract and CrewAI dependency review (#86)
crewai.canonical_ownership: stays in JobPipe — deterministic contracts (AuthoringCaseContext, GeneratedApplicationPackage, DocumentValidationResult) remain JobPipe-native and agent-runtime-swappable

authoring_mvp_lane.name: T002: AI document authoring MVP (cover letter + tailored CV)
authoring_mvp_lane.position_decision_notes: Option C (hybrid): deterministic contracts + validation stay JobPipe-native. crewAI enters only inside the author/revise agent layer. Contracts must be agent-runtime-swappable.

contracts.AuthoringCaseContext: immutable frozen dataclass - candidate + job + evidence bundle going into author
contracts.GeneratedApplicationPackage: pydantic model - cover_letter_draft + tailored_cv_projection + evidence_refs + gap_notes + validation
contracts.DocumentValidationResult: pydantic model - passed + score + failures + warnings

open_risks: Python 3.14 + anyio plugin autoload breaks pytest on Windows; workaround still active. Follow-up slice should add pytest config or pin plugins.
T002 Option C requires that the author/revise contract layer stays agent-runtime-swappable. First crew slice must not couple tightly to CrewAI primitives.
Worktrees Jobpipe-orchestrator-v2, Jobpipe-claude-v2, Jobpipe-codex-v2 may still exist on disk from T002 Sprint 1. Verify and clean up before next sprint.
prototype folder referenced in specs/controlled-cv-tailoring.md not found at Jobpipe root — confirm if moved, deleted, or located elsewhere.

Job Hunter crew Phase 3: cv_tailor and cover_letter_writer use claude-sonnet-4-6 which hits Anthropic 429 rate limits when run after a full Haiku session. Resume is 19KB (~4800 tokens); consider trimming profile_resume_json for cv_tailor. Validated end-to-end with Haiku fallback — chain works.
GitNexus removed (2026-05-05); Axon is now the only code-intelligence MCP. Re-index with `axon analyze .` before any slice requiring symbol-level search.
needs_founder_decision: Which Ready queue item to start next: intake (#9/#10/#12) vs profile import (#13/#16) vs CV authoring (#17/#18/#19). Profile import + CV authoring are P0; intake is P1 but unblocked.

Reactive Resume tailoring approach: constrained (show/hide + bounded rewrites per rewrite_policy) vs free creative room. specs/controlled-cv-tailoring.md recommends constrained — confirm before implementing #17/#18/#19.
Optimal resume definition: agree on what a top-quality tailored CV looks like for Lars's role family before the Resume Strategist agent prompt is written.

recent_decisions.decision: JobSane sub-crew architecture spec written (specs/jobsane-crew-architecture-2026-05-03.md). Five sub-crews: Ground Layer, CV Tailoring, Cover Letter, Screening Questions, Interview Prep. CrewAI Flow orchestrates. Constrained tailoring confirmed as the right approach.
recent_decisions.rationale: Sub-crews are independently replaceable, each optimised for its task. Ground layer assembled once and shared downstream. Data sovereignty over local compute — cloud LLM APIs acceptable, canonical state stays in Jobpipe.

recent_decisions.decision: Local-first means data sovereignty and process control, not local compute. Cloud LLM APIs (Claude Sonnet, GPT-4o) are acceptable for writing tasks.
recent_decisions.rationale: Lars's hardware (8GB RAM laptop) cannot run quality LLMs locally. The value of local-first is owning all candidate data and controlling the process — not offline compute.

recent_decisions.decision: Op 2 executed end-to-end: PR #90 merged, archive tag oss-main-pre-unify pushed, origin/main force-updated to 9446998.
recent_decisions.rationale: All slices completed. Main now reflects the unified private-lane codebase.

recent_decisions.decision: T002 Option C (hybrid) for crewAI positioning
recent_decisions.rationale: Deterministic contracts + validation stay JobPipe-native; crewAI enters inside the author/revise agent layer only. Preserves 'data is the product, JobPipe is the engine' invariant.

recent_decisions.decision: Upstream fork model: use reactive-resume and jobsync upstream-as-intended via slim JSON/event seams.
recent_decisions.rationale: Slim seams keep JobPipe modular. If any upstream goes stale, the adapter is replaceable.

coordinator_leverage_scaffolding.purpose: One-time Opus work so Sonnet planner + Codex implementer can run cheap and stable without coordinator re-routing per slice.
coordinator_still_owns: Sprint goal + slice ordering (set once per sprint in the task execplan)
Review gate stamps before Codex runs
Approval Gate judgment calls (auth, billing, migrations, deployment, secrets, destructive deletes, pipeline semantics, scoring/selection, OSS/Workbench boundary, model-cost)
Cross-task architectural decisions not yet in decisions.md
Routing a new task from scratch or closing a sprint and opening the next
